text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're glad to have you on board!
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Can't wait to see what events we put together!
Welcome to the community, newbie_kim! You've been approved as a member. Feel free to explore and introduce yourself!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. We're excited to have you share your knowledge with new members!
